_doc_direction_mapping.rule: Maps 4-class regime_label + confidence threshold to 3-class direction key used in matrix lookup

mapping.choppy_recovery: sideways  (transitional regime; defaults to sideways regardless of confidence)

_doc_vol_tercile_source: regime_labels_v2_vol_augmented.parquet column vol_tercile in {low, mid, high}. Tercile assignment is WF-OOS-correct (rolling-252d, no look-ahead).

A.name: Symmetric Kelly (headline proposal)
A.description: Theory-driven 3-step gradient. Bull/low = idle-capital compensation; Bear/high = cliff insurance. The default proposed in issue #25.

B.name: Aggressive Kelly (steeper)
B.description: Larger swings around baseline. Bull/low = 2.0x; Bear/high = 0.3x. Tests whether sharper Kelly bets dominate.

C.name: Conservative Kelly (gentler)
C.description: Smaller swings around baseline. Min 0.7x, max 1.25x. Tests whether subtle modulation is enough.

D.name: Vol-only ablation control (1D)
D.description: Strip direction axis. Multiplier depends only on vol tercile. Ablation control: tests whether vol axis alone captures the edge.

E.name: Direction-only ablation control (1D)
E.description: Strip vol axis. Multiplier depends only on regime direction. Ablation control: tests whether direction axis alone captures the edge.

F.name: Search-space schema (grid / Bayesian opt)
F.description: Not a fixed matrix. Search-space specification for the executor. Per issue #25 + #27, use 1k random samples + local search around top-10, OR Bayesian opt per #27 algorithm choice. β-mode n_safety_orders multiplier must hard-floor at 4 SOs (per server team confirmation 2026-05-21).

_doc_baseline.config: Stream 2.a ungated DCA — base_pct=0.5%, n_safety_orders=9, first_so_step=2.57, so_step_scale=1.69, so_volume_scale=2.30, strand_ban_days=122 (per paper-trade-tier0.sh)
_doc_baseline.comparison_anchor: All variants are multipliers ON TOP of this baseline. multiplier=1.0 everywhere = identity = baseline.
